behavior_in_task_description.reason: Instruction names the file path NothingFoundInfo.tsx and describes the target/rel attributes; tests check these same attributes.

no_solution_leakage.reason: Instruction describes the problem (link security, new tab, HTML syntax) without stating target="_blank" or rel="noopener noreferrer" literally.

solution_uniqueness_guard.reason: Tests accept rel tokens in either order and only require target="_blank" plus noopener+noreferrer, allowing alternative correct fixes.

tests_verify_behavior_not_text.reason: Tests execute pnpm lint, pnpm test, and prettier subprocesses in addition to static file checks.

test_not_tautological.reason: f2p tests require the specific attribute fixes which a stub cannot satisfy without actually editing the component.

behavior_in_tests.reason: Both required behaviors (new-tab opening and security rel) are directly asserted.

informative_test_structure.reason: Tests are individually named with docstrings indicating fail_to_pass/pass_to_pass intent.

structured_data_schema.reason: Task modifies a UI component, no structured data output.

no_typos.reason: Paths and commands (pnpm run lint, NothingFoundInfo.tsx) are consistent and correct.

instruction_no_hint_leakage.reason: Instruction points to the component file which is the logical scope; doesn't name exact line or attribute values.

config_edit_scope_bounded.reason: Code-only task, not a config edit.
